howItWorks.intro: This water flow rate calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Velocity depends on pressure head and friction losses
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How do I calculate water flow rate?
faq.answer: Flow rate depends on pipe diameter, water pressure, and pipe length. For most homes, 3/4 inch pipe at 50 PSI provides 8-12 GPM flow.

howWeCalculate.intro: This water flow rate calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
